title: Deep dive 18: Phan tich master prompt va validate do chinh xac
question: Master prompt dang dua tren nhung nguon nao trong notebook?
Nguon nao la source of truth chinh de doi chieu do chinh xac?
Claim quan trong nhat trong master prompt la gi?
Claim nao duoc nguon ho tro truc tiep?
Claim nao chi la suy luan hop ly?
Claim nao chua duoc nguon ho tro hoac can nap them tai lieu?
Co contradiction nao giua master prompt, research pack, transcript, competitor analysis va content skeleton khong?
Master prompt co xac dinh ro audience, market/language, viewer intent va content format khong?
Master prompt co phan biet search intent voi viewer intent khong?
Keyword research da du de ket luan viewer intent chua, hay can comment/competitor/session context?
Research pack co noi ro doi thu dang lam format nao, hook nao, title/thumbnail promise nao khong?
Master prompt co hoc cong thuc tu doi thu ma khong copy noi dung doi thu khong?
Micro-niche hoac gap ma master prompt chon co bang chung ve nhu cau khong?
Chu de co du du lieu de lam 10-15 video lien tiep khong?
Master prompt co khoa duoc subject type va subject topic o muc cu the khong?
Subject topic co qua rong, qua mo ho, hay khong du can cu factual khong?
Master prompt co du thong tin ve entity, thoi ky, dia diem, mechanism, hanh vi, visual anchor khong?
Neu la chu de lich su/khoa hoc/suc khoe, prompt co yeu cau nguon dang tin va canh bao factual risk khong?
Neu la chu de co rui ro IP/policy, prompt co dat gioi han an toan khong?
Master prompt co bien research thanh content skeleton ro rang khong?
Master prompt co quy dinh script skeleton truoc khi bung script dai khong?
Master prompt co quy tac chia scene theo huu canh, khong chia may moc theo cau khong?
Moi scene co can du main subject, action/state, environment, camera/lens va visual anchor khong?
Prompt anh co subject details, environment lock, camera/lens, action beginning va policy-safe wording khong?
Prompt video co motion logic, action timing, camera movement, consistency lock va audio/emotion cue khong?
Co yeu cau nao trong prompt video khong kha thi voi AI video hien tai khong?
Chu de nay co can nguoi that, cam xuc that, canh that, ban do, stock footage, hay do chinh xac hinh anh cao khong?
Master prompt co noi ro khi nao dung AI image/video, khi nao dung stock/tu lieu that khong?
Prompt co yeu cau QA gate cho script, image, video, edit va publish khong?
Prompt co bat buoc test 1 tap/1 section/5-10 scene mau truoc batch khong?
Batch rule co hop ly voi rui ro format, token limit va consistency khong?
Output format cua prompt co du ro de copy, automate, va kiem tra loi khong?
Nhung truong input bat buoc nao trong master prompt dang thieu?
Nhung truong nao dang thua, lap lai, hoac lam prompt kho cap nhat?
Diem do chinh xac 0-100 cua master prompt la bao nhieu?
Confidence cua ket luan la Low, Medium hay High?
Nhung P0 fix nao phai sua truoc khi dung prompt de san xuat?
Nhung P1/P2 fix nao nen sua de tang chat luong hoac kha nang scale?
Neu chi duoc sua 5 block trong master prompt, nen sua block nao?
Can nap them nguon nao vao NotebookLM de validate chac hon?
